'''morangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twatish|twatish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twatish|twatish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| morangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:morangithi|morangithi]] || [[word:morangiji|morangiji]] || [[word:morangishi|morangishi]] || [[word:morangiki|morangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:moranguthuthu|moranguthuthu]] || [[word:morangujuju|morangujuju]] || [[word:morangushushu|morangushushu]] || [[word:morangukuku|morangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:moranguthu|moranguthu]] || [[word:moranguju|moranguju]] || [[word:morangushu|morangushu]] || [[word:moranguku|moranguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:morangufthuf|morangufthuf]] || [[word:morangufjuf|morangufjuf]] || [[word:morangufshuf|morangufshuf]] || [[word:morangufkuf|morangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:morangethe|morangethe]] || [[word:morangeje|morangeje]] || [[word:morangeshe|morangeshe]] || [[word:morangeke|morangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:morangothotho|morangothotho]] || [[word:morangojojo|morangojojo]] || [[word:morangoshosho|morangoshosho]] || [[word:morangokoko|morangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:morangotho|morangotho]] || [[word:morangojo|morangojo]] || [[word:morangosho|morangosho]] || [[word:morangoko|morangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:morangofthof|morangofthof]] || [[word:morangofjof|morangofjof]] || [[word:morangofshof|morangofshof]] || [[word:morangofkof|morangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:morangĂŻfthĂŻf|morangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfjĂŻf|morangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfshĂŻf|morangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfkĂŻf|morangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:morangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|morangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|morangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|morangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|morangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:morangĂŻfthĂŻf|morangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfjĂŻf|morangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfshĂŻf|morangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfkĂŻf|morangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:morangĂŻfthĂŻf|morangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfjĂŻf|morangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfshĂŻf|morangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:morangĂŻfkĂŻf|morangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:morangĂŠthĂŠ|morangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:morangĂŠjĂŠ|morangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:morangĂŠshĂŠ|morangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:morangĂŠkĂŠ|morangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:morangathatha|morangathatha]] || [[word:morangajaja|morangajaja]] || [[word:morangashasha|morangashasha]] || [[word:morangakaka|morangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:morangatha|morangatha]] || [[word:morangaja|morangaja]] || [[word:morangasha|morangasha]] || [[word:morangaka|morangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:morangafthaf|morangafthaf]] || [[word:morangafjaf|morangafjaf]] || [[word:morangafshaf|morangafshaf]] || [[word:morangafkaf|morangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:morangasha|morangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:morangshĂ«sha|morangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:morangrosha|morangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:morangmusha|morangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:morangyasha|morangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomorangnkshĂ«sha|gomorangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomorangnkrosha|gomorangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomorangnkmusha|gomorangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomorangnkyasha|gomorangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:morarangasha|morarangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:morarangshĂ«sha|morarangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:morarangrosha|morarangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:morarangmusha|morarangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:morarangyasha|morarangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomorarangnkshĂ«sha|gomorarangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomorarangnkrosha|gomorarangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomorarangnkmusha|gomorarangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomorarangnkyasha|gomorarangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:merĂŠngasha|merĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:merĂŠngshĂ«sha|merĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:merĂŠngrosha|merĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:merĂŠngmusha|merĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:merĂŠngyasha|merĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomerĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gomerĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomerĂŠngnkrosha|gomerĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomerĂŠngnkmusha|gomerĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomerĂŠngnkyasha|gomerĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:morfangasha|morfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:morfangshĂ«sha|morfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:morfangrosha|morfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:morfangmusha|morfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:morfangyasha|morfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomorfangnkshĂ«sha|gomorfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomorfangnkrosha|gomorfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomorfangnkmusha|gomorfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomorfangnkyasha|gomorfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
